title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Verify animations are functional on all onboarding screens including initial setup loading screens and the 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens.
steps: Launch the application and observe the initial setup loading screen for any animations.
Proceed to the 'Well hello, first thing first...' screen and verify that all animations (e.g., transitions, element movements) are functioning correctly.
Navigate to the 'Up-to-Date' screen and check that animations play as expected.
Move to the 'Personal' screen and confirm animations are working properly.
Advance to the 'Organized' screen and ensure all animations are functional.
expected: All animations on the initial setup loading screen and the 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens play smoothly and correctly without any glitches or freezes.
